## Helpers.createSessionId() function

Creates a composite [SessionId](./ts-chocolate.sessionid.md) from [collection ID](./ts-chocolate.collectionid.md) and [base session ID](./ts-chocolate.basesessionid.md)<!-- -->.

